records.ety: [L. haemorrhoidae, pl., Gr. <?/, sing., <?/ (sc. <?/), pl., veins liable to discharge blood, hemorrhoids, fr. <?/ flowing with blood; a"i^ma blood + <?/ to flow: cf. F. hmorrodes, hmorrhodes. See Rheum.]

defs: Livid and painful swellings formed by the dilation of the blood vessels around the margin of, or within, the anus, from which blood or mucus is occasionally discharged; piles; emerods.
